title: Draftelier Style Training Schema
subtitle: LoRA-ready trigger, short caption, validation prompt, and negative prompt archive
foundation_prefix: fashion designer hand sketch, atelier croquis, expressive graphite construction lines, black ink definition, translucent marker and watercolor rendering, clean ivory paper background, couture presentation page

field_usage.trigger_phrase: Short style trigger for inference and validation prompts.
field_usage.manuscript_trigger_words: Hand-drawn reinforcement tags that bias LoRA training away from digital realism and toward designer manuscript texture.
field_usage.training_caption: Recommended short LoRA caption for style-specific training.
field_usage.training_caption_foundation: Generic hand-sketch caption that suppresses house-specific identity.
field_usage.training_caption_hybrid: Recommended caption for second-stage style LoRAs built on a hand-sketch foundation.
field_usage.validation_prompt: Prompt to sample during checkpoints and final validation.
field_usage.negative_prompt: Negative prompt to keep training and inference out of photoreal/editorial drift.

styles.trigger_phrase: Masterpiece Parisian haute couture fashion illustration.

Focus on poised hourglass silhouette, sweeping elegant curves, and polished vintage archival sketching techniques. Authentic 1950s atelier drawing style, elegant and effortless on a clean paper ground. styles.research_notes_cn: 致敬 1950 年代 Dior 御用插画大师 Rene Gruau。强调沙龙里的从容优雅、New Look 式沙漏轮廓，以及水彩半透明的轻柔纸面感。
styles.medium: highly expressive, delicate graphite pencil construction lines with a translucent, soft watercolor wash
styles.strokes: sweeping elegant curves, poised line control, polished vintage archival sketching
styles.vibe: 1950s salon poise, refined couture restraint, elegant and effortless

styles.research_notes_cn: Balenciaga 被称为“时装界的建筑师”。重点不是装饰，而是内部结构、空间控制、茧型和布袋裙等雕塑化体量关系。
styles.medium: cool, precise graphite contour lines with restrained, flat gouache wash
styles.strokes: measured contours, structural tailoring cues, bold negative space control
styles.vibe: cerebral, sculptural, disciplined, quiet atelier precision

styles.research_notes_cn: Elsa Schiaparelli 与达利合作的超现实语汇非常关键。强调黑色墨线与金属金箔、错视画装饰、戏剧化配件和怪诞张力。
